The ability to use suitable utensils to bring food and/or liquid to the mouth and swallow food and/or liquid once the meal is placed before the resident. effective 10/01/2019
758 GG0130B5_SELF_CARE_ORAL_CD GG0130B5_SELF_CARE_ORAL_CD GG0130B5 Self Care: Oral Hygiene Ability (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Oral hygiene: The ability to use suitable items to clean teeth. Dentures (if applicable): The ability to insert and remove dentures into and from the mouth, and manage denture soaking and rinsing with
